problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: Combining Quantum annealing for optimization problems with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
